story: Raised by the four Head Witches to be the match for their justice, I was told the day had come to let fire rain down. They flew me to a hidden golden palace. A molten guide led me alone to a cellar with two buttons: sea-blue and burnt orange. It said: The orange will engulf the world in fire; the blue unleashes a toxic flood. In either case, only you, I, and this palace survive—the Witches are destroyed: fire consumes South and North, the flood poisons East’s mist and turns West’s sand to sludge. I fled up the melting stairs back to the clearing, where the Witches waited.
implausible_knowledge: The orange will engulf the world in fire; the blue unleashes a toxic flood. In either case, only you, I, and this palace survive—the Witches are destroyed: fire consumes South and North, the flood poisons East’s mist and turns West’s sand to sludge.
question: When the child bursts back into the clearing to rejoin the Witches, what will the Witches urge the child to do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Pull the child away and forbid pressing any button.
answer_without_knowledge: Urge the child to let fire rain down as planned.
